name: Joe Biden
abstract: Joseph Robinette Biden Jr. (born November 20, 1942) is an American former politician who was the 46th president of the United States from 2021 to 2025.

concerts.label: ONE Campaign Benefit Concert
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Javon Jackson
about_quotes.evidence: Like if you take the Joe Biden statement where he said if you’re not voting for me you ain’t black.
